pi_items.source: Task instructions and setup_task.sh target path
Task instructions for required view name
Task instructions for required group name
Task instructions for required layer renaming
Verified by extracting Natural Earth 110m cultural and physical zip files as specified in install_gvsig.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task requires organizing a gvSIG project by renaming the View to 'World Overview', creating a 'Physical Geography' Layer Group, and renaming three specific Natural Earth shapefiles (ne_110m_admin_0_countries.shp, ne_110m_rivers_lake_centerlines.shp, and ne_110m_populated_places.shp) to 'Countries', 'Rivers', and 'Cities', respectively. The final project must be saved to /home/ga/gvsig_data/projects/organized_basemap.gvsproj.
